summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of RADIOAMICA Italian university master program landing page. All functionality working perfectly including navigation, sections, mobile responsiveness, and external links.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with hero section and dark gradient background
Navigation menu displays all required items (Introduzione, Comitato Scientifico, Organizzazione Corsi, Studenti, News, Progetto)
Smooth scroll navigation to all sections works perfectly
Intro section displays complete Italian content correctly
Committee section shows all 11 members with proper information and styling
Courses section displays 2 modules with accordion functionality working correctly
Students section shows all 16 students in scrollable area with proper cards
News section displays workshop announcement with brochure image loading correctly
External project link to https://projects.dimes.unical.it/radioamica/ works in both navbar and project section
Mobile menu toggle functionality works perfectly on smaller screens
All logo images (navbar, hero, project section) load correctly
Hero CTA buttons ('Scopri il Master', 'Programma Didattico') scroll to correct sections
Mobile responsiveness excellent across different screen sizes
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% - All 18 test scenarios passed successfully
